queries.question: For every finance app, show the tools and their respective categories.
queries.sql: select finance_apps.name , tools.tool_name , tools.category from Finance_Apps_Tools join Tools on Finance_Apps_Tools.tool_id = Tools.id join Finance_Apps on Finance_Apps_Tools.finance_app_id = Finance_Apps.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?tool_name ?category WHERE {
  ?finance_apps_tools a :Finance_Apps_Tools .
  ?tools a :Tools .
  ?finance_apps_tools p:hasTools ?tools .
  ?finance_apps a :Finance_Apps .
  ?finance_apps_tools p:hasFinance_Apps ?finance_apps .
  ?finance_apps p:name ?name .
  ?tools p:tool_name ?tool_name .
  ?tools p:category ?category .
}

queries.question: Which tool is common to every finance app and what is its category?
queries.sql: SELECT Tools.tool_name, Tools.category  from Finance_Apps_Tools join Tools on Finance_Apps_Tools.tool_id = Tools.id join Finance_Apps on Finance_Apps_Tools.finance_app_id = Finance_Apps.id   GROUP BY Finance_Apps_Tools.tool_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Finance_Apps_Tools.finance_app_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Finance_Apps)

queries.sql: select finance_apps.name , tools.category from Finance_Apps_Tools join Tools on Finance_Apps_Tools.tool_id = Tools.id join Finance_Apps on Finance_Apps_Tools.finance_app_id = Finance_Apps.id

queries.question: For every finance app, show the tools that they have.
queries.sql: select finance_apps.name , tools.tool_name from Finance_Apps_Tools join Tools on Finance_Apps_Tools.tool_id = Tools.id join Finance_Apps on Finance_Apps_Tools.finance_app_id = Finance_Apps.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?tool_name WHERE {
  ?finance_apps_tools a :Finance_Apps_Tools .
  ?tools a :Tools .
  ?finance_apps_tools p:hasTools ?tools .
  ?finance_apps a :Finance_Apps .
  ?finance_apps_tools p:hasFinance_Apps ?finance_apps .
  ?finance_apps p:name ?name .
  ?tools p:tool_name ?tool_name .
}

queries.question: What category of tools does each app offer
queries.sql: SELECT Tools.category  from Finance_Apps_Tools join Tools on Finance_Apps_Tools.tool_id = Tools.id join Finance_Apps on Finance_Apps_Tools.finance_app_id = Finance_Apps.id   GROUP BY Finance_Apps_Tools.tool_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Finance_Apps_Tools.finance_app_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Finance_Apps)

queries.question: Which tools do all finance apps have in common?
queries.sql: SELECT Tools.tool_name  from Finance_Apps_Tools join Tools on Finance_Apps_Tools.tool_id = Tools.id join Finance_Apps on Finance_Apps_Tools.finance_app_id = Finance_Apps.id   GROUP BY Finance_Apps_Tools.tool_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Finance_Apps_Tools.finance_app_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Finance_Apps)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the tools and their categories that every finance app offers.
What category of tools does each app offer
Give me the tools that all the finance apps have.
